a11y: Toasts are delivered to an aria-live="polite" region (Sonner default). Use aria-live="assertive" for critical errors.
Auto-dismissing toasts: pause the timer on hover/focus; offer a manual close.
Don't put required user decisions in a toast — use a Dialog instead.
boundaries: Built on Base UI Toast (toast, toastManager) — NOT the sonner npm package, despite the shadcn-parity file name; a deliberate divergence.
description: An opinionated toast component for React; transient success/error notifications. Toaster + toast().
name: sonner
title: Sonner

do: Render one <Toaster /> at the app root and fire notifications with toast().
Use for transient success/error feedback that needs no response.
dont: Don't put required user decisions in a toast — use alert-dialog.
Don't use toasts for persistent inline messages — use alert.

whenToUseInstead.when: the user must confirm before continuing
